# Venus Protocol Summary

Venus Protocol highlights include: security warnings against fraudulent venus.eth domain; Ceffu Global onboarding to attract institutional capital to BNB Chain; isolated pools sunset with user fund safety maintained; Pendle Finance fixed-rate BNB vault integration offering locked APY through June 2026; DOT market paused due to Hyperbridge gateway vulnerability exploiting unauthorized token minting.

tweets.fullText:
🛡️ Security reminder: We do not own the venus.eth ENS name. We have no affiliation with anything or anyone operating under it.

Always verify communications through official channels only. If something looks suspicious, don’t interact with it and report it.

Venus Protocol has completed onboarding with @CeffuGlobal, marking a defining milestone in the protocol’s push to bring professional capital into @BNBCHAIN on-chain markets.

Read more about it here:
https://t.co/itFWDoDJ3c https://t.co/zFFjtps1Oh

Isolated pools on Venus are now sunset. All pools are paused, but your funds are safe — withdrawals are still open.

If you still have a position, here's what to do:
→ Asset available on Venus Core? Migrate or withdraw.
→ Asset not on Venus? Withdraw now.
tweets.aiAnalysis:
# Analysis

This tweet underperformed due to **lack of emotional urgency and missing visual hierarchy**. While the sunset announcement itself is significant news, the wall-of-text format with procedural instructions dilutes impact—a visual diagram or numbered steps graphic would've dramatically improved shareability, and the vague "your funds are safe" reassurance without specific details (timeline, mechanism, potential risks) reads as defensive rather than compelling, failing to convert concerned users into engaged sharers.

Ready to earn fixed yield on your #BNB?

The @pendle_fi Fixed Rate Vault on Venus Core locks your APY at deposit.

Get started in seconds🔒:
1️⃣ Connect wallet
2️⃣ Deposit $BNB
3️⃣ Confirm
That’s it, your fixed yield is locked. 

⏰ Hold to maturity for full return (Jun25,2026) https://t.co/41FciM4KTl
tweets.aiAnalysis: The low engagement stems from weak emotional hooks and lack of differentiation—"fixed yield" is a familiar crypto product benefit that doesn't create urgency or FOMO, while the step-by-step instructional format reads more like onboarding documentation than compelling marketing. The specific maturity date (Jun 25, 2026) and missing APY percentage are missed opportunities; explicitly stating the yield rate would've provided concrete value proposition that drives clicks and shares.

tweets.fullText:
🚨 DOT Paused on Venus
A vulnerability in the Hyperbridge gateway was exploited, allowing unauthorized minting of DOT tokens on Ethereum. As a precaution, we have taken the following actions:

- Paused DOT supply and borrowing
- Set DOT collateral factor to 0
- Removed DOT market

Interim Update

We recognize the impact this has had across our users and the builders who have integrated with us - many of whom rely on Drift as core infrastructure.

We’re actively working on next steps and will share more once details are finalized.

Drift is actively working with @asymmetric_re, and @osec_io to consolidate a coordinated recovery plan.

Our immediate focus is to stabilize the situation and provide protocol-level assurance to all affected users and partners.

Drift will also be participating in the STRIDE

competitors.aiSummary:
# Kamino Liquidity Summary

Kamino promotes high-yield liquidity pools across Solana, emphasizing incentive structures and APY metrics. Key pools include TRUMP-SOL (261% APY with 15K weekly $TRUMP incentives), ORE-SOL (~80% APY), PYUSD-USDC (leading fee generation), and ONyc-JitoSOL (35% APY plus compounding yields). Features highlight automatic rebalancing, minimal impermanent loss, and capital efficiency.
